title: What's Now? — 2022 outline + die-with-victory quote (2021)
html:
What's Now? — 2022 outline + die-with-victory quote (2021)

Source: 2021-12-27 Apple Note. End-of-year transition note: a Horace Mann–style epigraph + 7-item 2022 setup list.

TL;DR

  • Epigraph: "Be ashamed to die, until you have scored some victory for humanity" (Horace Mann) — opens the year-planning note. Same energy as the later 2025 01 Project 2025 manifesto.
  • 2022 outline is the explicit framing — first capture of yearly-planning as a recurring ritual; that ritual is mature by the Project 2025 note 4 years later.
  • Operational items: FAFSA, fix glasses at Walmart, call chiropractor, Emilio question review, call Ayoli for physical, eat with David. Mix of admin + relational.
  • Eat with David — early appearance of David / Dave; the same David recurs through the 2024 10 Dave eulogy note.
  • OSU end-of-fall mental snapshot: combines admin reset, body maintenance (chiropractor, physical), and friend-time priority. The pattern of eating with people as a year-anchor persists into Austin era.

Connections

  • david
  • emilio
  • osu
  • 2025 01 01 project 2025 — the mature version of this ritual
  • 2024 10 16 dave eulogy — David's exit

related.label: Dave eulogy — 'so long brother till we meet again'
